result.summary: Analyzed sub_layer_0_05_rules: 131 markdown rule files across comprehensive governance structure with tiered rule application

subdirectories.0_every_api_request: Rules for EVERY API interaction (always apply)
subdirectories.1_scenario_based: Rules for specific scenarios (apply when relevant)

everApiRequest.description: Rules that MUST be followed on EVERY interaction
rules: AI_CONTEXT_MODIFICATION_PROTOCOL.md - Show diagram, wait for approval before modifying AI context
AI_CONTEXT_COMMIT_PUSH_RULE.md - Git add/commit/push after approved AI context changes
CONTEXT_TRAVERSAL_RULE.md - Read CLAUDE.md files and gather context before starting work

scenarioBased.description: Rules that apply in specific scenarios
rules: safety_governance.md - Security decisions, permission escalations, sensitive operations
LAYER_CONTEXT_HEADER_PROTOCOL.md - Creating new files that need layer/stage headers
sequential_development_methodology.md - Multi-step development tasks, planning workflows

corePrinciples: Least Privilege - Agents operate with minimum permissions needed
Defense in Depth - Multiple layers of protection (filesystem, network, commands)
Audit Everything - All actions are logged for review
Human Oversight - Critical decisions require human approval
Fail Secure - When in doubt, deny and escalate

permissionLevelsByLayer.layer0_universal: Level 4 (System Manager) - Full workspace access, approval needed for deletes/security changes
permissionLevelsByLayer.layer1_project: Level 3 (Project Manager) - Project files, approval for dependencies/CI changes
permissionLevelsByLayer.layer2_features: Level 2 (Standard Agent) - Feature files, safe commands only

contextPriority.inheritance: Higher-numbered layers inherit from lower-numbered layers
contextPriority.override: Higher layers can override lower layers with @override marker
contextPriority.precedence: CLAUDE.local.md > position in chain > layer number
